pr.title: #257 Pingbang trigger leakage: path-shaped semantic neighbors + dictionary cognates
pr.body:
Closes #257.

Plan v4 (epm:plan v4 comment) + full plan in [gist](https://gist.github.com/superkaiba/bacfa67fccd6d77fb801d1a0c5f22b07).

3-revision-round adversarial-planner output (planner → fact-check → 3-critic ×2 → revise ×2 → user approval).

**Cost:** ~$4.10 / ~92 min on 1× H100. 16,600 generations.

Subsequent commits will be added by experiment-implementer.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)
